creator: plosher@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fix: See attached patches - moved the existing spool.c patch to it's own conditional and added one for 8.x systems.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/mail/dma under a 8.x box and watch it blow...

[...]
/usr/ports/mail/dma/work/corecode-dma-2bb8bcb/dma/..//spool.c: In function 'flushqueue_since':
/usr/ports/mail/dma/work/corecode-dma-2bb8bcb/dma/..//spool.c:419: error: 'struct stat' has no member named 'st_mtim'
